subtopics.title: Crops and their Cultivation
common_misconceptions: All crops grow the same way
Harvested crops don't need special storage
subtopics.teaching_note: Major crops in Nigeria: Maize, Rice, Yam, Cassava, Beans, Groundnut, Cocoa, Palm oil, Cotton. Factors for crop growth: soil, water, sunlight, temperature. Crop stages: land preparation, planting, weeding, pest control, harvesting, storage, marketing. Storage methods: barns, silos, refrigeration, drying.
